reasoning: Emotional (60%): The key reads as warm, bright, and charming — saturated gold/orange shaft with a circular bow housing a multicolored gem (pink, blue, green, red pixels) that evokes classic Zelda treasure aesthetics. Round bow silhouette is friendly and toy-diorama in feel. Color palette is fully within the bright/warm Hyrule spectrum; nothing grim or desaturated. Emotional score: 8/10. Technical (40%): At the zoomed panels the 1px hard outline is clean and consistent with no anti-aliasing bleed. The key shaft shows a clear 2–3 tone hard shading progression (dark border, mid gold, lighter gold highlight on the inner edge). All pixels appear grid-snapped and the hand-pixeled texture reads authentically. Gem pixels are small distinct colored blocks — stylistically appropriate and not muddy. Technical score: 8/10. Weighted total: 0.6×8 + 0.4×8 = 8.0. Denzi reference (helmets/shields) confirms the technical bar for 1px outlines and limited hard tone shading, which this key meets. No axis failures detected.
